title: Copyright and Menu Mnemonics
text: Copyright and Menu Mnemonics These mnemonics define the appearance of a few characters used in applications. Arguments Mnemonic Explanation view_cc Copyright character(©). view_menu Menu character. BEGIN_SET 0 normal ASCII set ^esc(B select ascii set selection ^chr font_0 map (32-126) to 0.(32-126) ... (c) view_cc map copyright character END_SET Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
